AccountId.note: When dependent op needs 'AccountId' param, use for_each=aws.sso-admin.list_account_assignments_for_principal and set AccountId='{{ item.AccountId }}'

ApplicationArn.note: When dependent op needs 'ApplicationArn' param, use for_each=aws.sso-admin.list_applications and set ApplicationArn='{{ item.ApplicationArn }}'

InstanceArn.note: When dependent op needs 'InstanceArn' param, use for_each=aws.sso-admin.list_instances and set InstanceArn='{{ item.AccessControlAttributes }}'

PermissionSetArn.note: When dependent op needs 'PermissionSetArn' param, use for_each=aws.sso-admin.list_account_assignments_for_principal and set PermissionSetArn='{{ item.PermissionSetArn }}'

PrincipalId.note: When dependent op needs 'PrincipalId' param, use for_each=aws.sso-admin.list_application_assignments and set PrincipalId='{{ item.PrincipalId }}'

PrincipalType.note: When dependent op needs 'PrincipalType' param, use for_each=aws.sso-admin.list_application_assignments and set PrincipalType='{{ item.PrincipalType }}'

ResourceArn.note: When dependent op needs 'ResourceArn' param, use for_each=aws.sso-admin.list_tags_for_resource and set ResourceArn='{{ item.Key }}'

DescribeAccountAssignmentCreationStatus.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.AccountAssignmentCreationStatus.*

DescribeAccountAssignmentDeletionStatus.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.AccountAssignmentDeletionStatus.*

DescribeApplication.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.PortalOptions.*

DescribeApplicationAssignment.note: Flat emit — access top-level response fields directly

DescribeApplicationProvider.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.DisplayData.*

DescribeInstance.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.EncryptionConfigurationDetails.*

DescribeInstanceAccessControlAttributeCo.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.InstanceAccessControlAttributeConfiguration.*

DescribePermissionSet.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.PermissionSet.*

DescribePermissionSetProvisioningStatus.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.PermissionSetProvisioningStatus.*

DescribeTrustedTokenIssuer.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.TrustedTokenIssuerConfiguration.*

GetApplicationAssignmentConfiguration.note: Flat emit — access top-level response fields directly

GetApplicationAuthenticationMethod.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.AuthenticationMethod.*

GetApplicationGrant.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.Grant.*

GetApplicationSessionConfiguration.note: Flat emit — access top-level response fields directly

GetInlinePolicyForPermissionSet.note: Flat emit — access top-level response fields directly

GetPermissionsBoundaryForPermissionSet.note: Flat emit — do NOT use items_for, access via response.PermissionsBoundary.*
